title: Driftcornwall trust corpus schema v0
description: Structured 30-record trust-attestation corpus for the 17-stage retrieval pipeline case study.

claim_type.description: Normalized trust claim type (category or event type).

source_type.description: Forging-cost proxy bucket used for the case study.

timestamp_utc.description: Original UTC timestamp from the stored trust artifact.

evidence_payload.description: Human-readable evidence text from the stored artifact.

ground_truth_label.description: Verification status where available. `verified_true` = explicit settlement/escrow style verification present. `artifact_backed` = machine-generated or signed artifact present but not independently settled. `null` = peer claim only / no extra verification attached in corpus.

raw_score.description: Original trust score if present in source data.

supporting_meta.description: Optional machine-readable proof payload (escrow_meta, behavioral_meta, amount/currency, etc.).
